text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Three, two, one... There—gotcha! You<n>can't beat
me charging in blindly like<n>that!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, Shakur! Nice play! That's what I<n>call expert
positioning!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Come on, where'd all that bravado go,<n>huh? The
second you stop thinking, it's<n>game over for you!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, how long do you plan on sticking<n>around?
You're making it hard to focus.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I can't help it! You're simply so<n>amazing
even when you're playing<n>games. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Even if there's no path forward, you use<n>your own
strength to make one. You<n>have the defiant spirit
of a real hero!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Heh, a hero? That's not my style. Never<n>has
been...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I just can't resist the urge to prove my<n>theories
are unbeatable, even when it's<n>only a game. I'm
more like a self-serving<n>villain.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's exactly what the herowould say. ♪
